# Slides QA Snapshot (2026-04-25)

Scope: S0/S1/S2/S3 slide module surfaces after editor backlog completion.

## QA Commands Run

- `npm run typecheck` ✅ pass
- `npm run lint` ✅ pass
  - `check-tokens` clean
  - `check-stories` clean (`170` story files)
- `npx playwright test tests/e2e/slides-regression.spec.ts --workers=1` ✅ pass (`15/15`)
  - Includes S2 editor interaction coverage (`US-SLD-021`..`US-SLD-025`) plus existing S1/S3 regression checks.

## QA Notes

- `npm run test:smoke` (default parallel workers) is intermittently unstable in this environment due local dev-server connection drops (`ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED`) mid-run.
- Single-worker Playwright run completed green and is used as the robust verification gate for this pass.

## Story-Level Verification Added

- `US-SLD-010`: empty/paste/file preflight validation and recoverable error state.
- `US-SLD-011`: grouped warning UX + structured component result table.
- `US-SLD-012`: parse progress and cancel interaction states.
- `US-SLD-013`: fixture-driven import/export/re-import drift tolerance checks.
- `US-SLD-031..032`: save/autosave + My Slides/Template Library flows.
- `US-SLD-034..036`: draft recovery, conflict/revision handling, audit feed visibility, and end-to-end slide lifecycle regression coverage.
- `US-SLD-037`: unsaved-change confirmation guardrails across workspace and hub navigation.
- `US-SLD-038`: per-user draft recovery lifecycle, legacy key migration, and post-save recovery clearing.
- `US-SLD-039`: autosave retry queue with bounded backoff, reconnect acceleration, and manual retry/dismiss controls.
- `US-SLD-020`: scaled 16:9 canvas renderer from component JSON with baseline inline layer editing.
- `US-SLD-021`: single-select + multi-select movement, bounded drag behavior, keyboard nudge controls, and resize handle guardrails.
- `US-SLD-022`: inline edit mode with enter/escape/blur lifecycle, synchronized style toolbar controls, and minimum 14px font-size enforcement.
- `US-SLD-023`: shift multi-select toggles, group nudge movement, alignment commands, and distribution validation messaging.
- `US-SLD-024`: undo/redo stack coverage for move/resize/text/style edits with both button and keyboard shortcut controls.
- `US-SLD-025`: semantic canvas roles, keyboard-first selection/edit flows, conflict-safe shortcut handling, and in-app shortcut reference panel.

## Evidence Anchors

- Slides page + state machine: `src/app/slides/page.tsx`
- Import helpers: `src/components/slides/import-validation.ts`, `src/components/slides/html-import.ts`
- Export helper: `src/components/slides/html-export.ts`
- FE/BE contracts: `src/components/slides/persistence-types.ts`, `src/lib/slides.ts`, `functions/api/slides.js`
- Migration: `supabase/migrations/003_slides_platform.sql`
- Tests: `tests/e2e/slides-regression.spec.ts`, `tests/e2e/frontend-smoke.spec.ts`, `tests/fixtures/slides/*.html`

## Remaining Gaps

1. Visual regression coverage is still smoke-level; no screenshot diff baseline for slides yet.
